articles.title: Exiled Afghanistan women to tour England during T20 World Cup
articles.description: Afghan Refugee Women's Team will start their tour on June 22

articles.title: Duleep Trophy to kick off Indian domestic season; two-phase Ranji Trophy starts October 11
articles.description: The first part of the Ranji Trophy will be played between October and November, and the second phase between January and February

articles.title: Gaby Lewis to lead Ireland at T20 World Cup
articles.description: Orla Prendergast, the vice-captain for the T20 World Cup, will lead Ireland in a tri-series against Pakistan and West Indies before the big tournament as Gaby Lewis recovers from a leg injury

articles.title: Taijul takes six as Bangladesh complete 2-0 sweep
articles.description: Rizwan's 94 went in vain as Pakistan fell 78 short of their target of 437

articles.title: Bumrah rested for Afghanistan Test; Rahul replaces Pant as vice-captain
articles.description: Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli are in the ODI squad as India build towards the 2027 World Cup

articles.title: Former Australia and Queensland wicketkeeper John Maclean dies aged 80
articles.description: John Maclean played four Tests and two ODIs for Australia in 1978-79

articles.title: BBL on track to host season opener in Chennai in December
articles.description: CA has received positive feedback from both the Tamil Nadu Cricket Association (TNCA) and the BCCI to go ahead after a meeting at Chepauk on Monday

articles.title: MJK Smith, former England and Warwickshire captain, dies aged 92
articles.description: Batter led England in 25 of his 50 Tests, and also claimed an England cap as a fly-half in rugby union

articles.title: Lanka Premier League returns after two years, opener set for July 17
articles.description: Sri Lanka's T20 franchise competition returns for the first time since its 2024 edition, with the player draft scheduled for June 1

articles.title: Pakistan announce 16-member squad for Australia ODI series, include Babar Azam and Haris Rauf
articles.description: The main talking point involves the return of former captain Babar Azam, with wicketkeeper-batter Mohammad Rizwan getting the chop.
